title: Vatican Treaty
wikitext:
[]: Vatican Treaty [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Wed Jul 15, 2009 2:36 am Originally titled (gratuitous spoiler to some) "The treaty that says 3 Evas a country." Title changed in anticipation of complaints. (Changed again by Reichu to be more specific; "Vatican Treaty" isn't a spoiler since the term was released on the movie poster.) I'm confused when was that signed I don't remember it in the series. Why was it made if only 3 countries even had Evangelions. Note on edit: anticipation?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jul 15, 2009 2:40 am The Vatican Treaty is made up new for the movie, like pretty much everything in 2.0

[]: Re: The treaty that says 3 Evas a country.             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Wed Jul 15, 2009 2:53 am UltraBlackPilot wrote: Why was it made if only 3 countries even had Evangelions.

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Wed Jul 15, 2009 3:06 am To tell the truth, such a law would make sense. It could prevent one nation from getting enough EVAs to effortlessly conquering its neighbors.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Wed Jul 15, 2009 3:09 am scarmullet wrote: To tell the truth, such a law would make sense. It could prevent one nation from getting enough EVAs to effortlessly conquering its neighbors.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jul 15, 2009 3:33 am I Accidentally Dracula wrote: scarmullet wrote: To tell the truth, such a law would make sense. It could prevent one nation from getting enough EVAs to effortlessly conquering its neighbors.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Wed Jul 15, 2009 4:37 am Ornette wrote: Did they know only 1 place was going to be attacked when they decided to build Evas and sign that treaty? There was already an Angel battle outside of Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Wed Jul 15, 2009 5:08 am I don't quite see how a lack of a limitation treaty would mean only Japan can round up EVAs. It's not like NERV Japan said "gimme all your EVA!" (03 (at least in the series) was sent there because the US didn't want it anymore after the 04 incident) so that they had to sign such thing. Even if Japan has more than 3, other countries still could have their own in case Angels appear there. Not that I don't agree that such treaty would make sense in RL-politics, but in terms of the movie, suddenly coming out of nowhere and only resulting in forcing the plot in a certain direction, it just feels like cheating a reason to put 02 off the roster.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jul 15, 2009 5:59 am It does seem entirely silly, even from a practical standpoint. If an eva had to be put in storage as a spare, why not the untested one? I mean, we already knew that Gendo apparently doesn't have much of a grasp on strategy, but come on... Stupid plot device is stupid.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jul 15, 2009 6:16 am Does someone have a transcript of that scene with Misato and Asuka talking while Eva-02 was being put away? That conversation was pretty long and I was barely able to catch any of it, even after the second time watching it. Found it: ２号機のコアが取り外され、クレーンで吊り上げられていく。 拘束具を宛がわれ、封印される2号機。 十字架のように貼り付けられ、それをつけたクレーンが降下していく。 床が4つに割れ、開いていく封印扉。 それを眼前にするアスカとリツコとマヤ。 アスカ　何で私の２号機が封印されちゃうのよ！ リツコ　バチカン条約よ。知ってるでしょ。3号機との引き換え条件なの アスカ　修理中の0号機にすればいいじゃない！ リツコ　2号機のパスは今でもユーロが保有しているの、私たちにはどうにもできないのよ。現在はパイロットも白紙。ユーロから再通知があるまでは、おとなしくしてなさい アスカ　私以外誰にも乗れないのに… リツコ　エヴァは実戦兵器よ。全てにバックアップを用意しているわ。操縦者も含めてね アスカ　そんな…私の世界で唯一の居場所なのに

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 15, 2009 8:34 am Removed and being lifted up by crane. Well, there's a little something for the piloting thread...

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jul 15, 2009 10:18 am They can just take an S2 Organ out of the Eva's? That confuses me cause we all know that they are not met to even have them yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 15, 2009 10:24 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: They can just take an S2 Organ out of the Eva's? That confuses me cause we all know that they are not met to even have them yet.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Wed Jul 15, 2009 10:25 am I don't think the core and the S2 organ are the same thing. http://wiki.evageeks.org/S%C2%B2_Engine Besides, S2's have yet to make a Rebuild appearance. EDIT: Damn you Reichu! I knew you were going to beat me!

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Wed Jul 15, 2009 10:38 am Did they know only 1 place was going to be attacked when they decided to build Evas and sign that treaty?

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jul 15, 2009 11:11 am I'm sorry, I read that wrong. They took out the Core of Eva 02 and placed it within Eva 03. I find this odd since I thought that would be the body for the soul within Eva 02. Once within, I did not know they could be placed some where else.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Jul 15, 2009 12:03 pm NemZ wrote: It does seem entirely silly, even from a practical standpoint. If an eva had to be put in storage as a spare, why not the untested one? I mean, we already knew that Gendo apparently doesn't have much of a grasp on strategy, but come on... Stupid plot device is stupid.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Wed Jul 15, 2009 1:48 pm JimmyWolk wrote: It's not like NERV Japan said "gimme all your EVA!" (03 (at least in the series) was sent there because the US didn't want it anymore after the 04 incident) so that they had to sign such thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jul 15, 2009 2:04 pm It also seems Eva-02 is under European control, but the details of the treaty was talked about earlier (which was why I missed it in the conversation with Asuka while Eva-02 was being put away) and there's probably more context to it then. Someone will have to translate it from the transcript. 日向　僕が言うのも何なんですが、これだけダメージが大きいとエヴァの運用に支障が出てます。バチカン条約、破棄していいんじゃないですか？ ミサト　そうよね…条約で各国のエヴァ保有数が3体までと決められてるけど、3体だけだとやりくりきかないもの* マヤ　初号機優先で修理してますが…すべてのパーツをやりくりしてなんとかという感じです。0号機まではとても手はまわっていません リツコ　バチカン条約には各国のエゴがが絡んでいるもの。まず改正はムリね。おまけに５号機の件でユーロとロシアとアジアに介入してるみたいだし、政治が絡むといろいろ厄介ね マヤ　使徒と戦う前にやることが多すぎですよ

[]:             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Wed Jul 15, 2009 2:34 pm scarmullet wrote: To tell the truth, such a law would make sense. It could prevent one nation from getting enough EVAs to effortlessly conquering its neighbors.
